ref_text_raw: On 15 August 1940, the Allies invaded southern France, the invasion was called "Operation Dragoon".
ref_text_normalized: on 15 august 1940 the allies invaded southern france the invasion was called operation dragoon
text: On August 15, 1940, the Allies invaded Southern France and the invasion was called Operation Dragoon.
